privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.noData: This application does not collect, store, or transmit any personal data to external servers.
privacy.localStorage: All character data is saved exclusively in your browser's local storage (localStorage). No data leaves your device.
privacy.noCookies: We do not use tracking cookies, analytics, or any third-party services.
privacy.noAccount: No account registration is required. The application works entirely offline after the first load.

gdpr.banner: This app works entirely in your browser. No data is sent to any server. We only use a technical cookie to save your language preference.

meta.listDescription: Browse and download ready-to-play characters for D&D 5e, Brancalonia, and Apocalisse. Free PDF sheets, JSON export, and more.

ranger-elf-elara-nightwhisper.description: A keen-eyed wood elf ranger who patrols the ancient forests of the northern borderlands. Elara is a deadly archer and a skilled tracker, equally at home stalking game through the undergrowth or picking off goblinoid raiders from the treeline. Her bond with the natural world runs deep, and she has devoted her life to protecting the wilderness from those who would despoil it.
ranger-elf-elara-nightwhisper.bio: Born one hundred and twenty-seven years ago beneath the silver canopy of the Whispering Woods, Elara was raised among a secluded community of wood elves who served as wardens of the forest. From childhood she learned to read animal tracks, navigate by starlight, and move through the undergrowth without disturbing a single leaf. When a band of gnoll marauders burned the eastern grove and scattered her kin, Elara took up the longbow and swore an oath to hunt those who threaten the wilds. She has spent decades roaming the frontier, guided by the wind and the call of the wolf, offering her skills to any settlement threatened by monstrous incursions.
ranger-elf-elara-nightwhisper.personality: Quiet and observant, Elara speaks more to animals than to people. She is slow to trust outsiders but fiercely loyal once a bond is forged. She prefers the company of the open sky to crowded taverns and grows restless if confined to a city for too long. Despite her solitary nature, she has a dry sense of humour and a soft spot for those in genuine need.

barbarian-halforc-grokk-ironfang.description: Grokk Ironfang is a Level 5 Half-Orc Barbarian (Berserker) whose uncontrollable rage drove him from a mercenary company into a life of wandering the borderlands. A fearsome warrior who can stare down a hell hound, he now seeks battles worthy of his fury and a way to master the beast within.
barbarian-halforc-grokk-ironfang.bio: Grokk grew up on the fringes of orcish war-camps, never fully accepted by either humans or orcs until a mercenary captain named Dara Voss recognised his raw talent and gave him a place in her Iron Fang Company. He served faithfully for six years, but during the Siege of Ashford his rage spiralled beyond control and he turned on his own comrades, leaving three wounded before he could be restrained. Expelled in disgrace, Grokk now roams the borderlands alone, seeking battles worthy of his fury and a way to master the beast that lives inside him.
barbarian-halforc-grokk-ironfang.personality: Grokk can stare down a hell hound without flinching and enjoys being strong and breaking things. He believes that in life as in war, the stronger force wins. He will never forget the mercenary company that took him in when no one else would, though his rage remains difficult to control and has hurt people he cares about.

bard-halfelf-lyra-silvertongue.description: Lyra Silvertongue is a Level 5 Half-Elf Bard (College of Lore) whose silver tongue and quick wit have opened doors in every court from the coast to the capital. A charming performer and enchantress, she searches for her vanished mentor while dazzling audiences across the realm.
bard-halfelf-lyra-silvertongue.bio: Lyra was born to a human merchant and an elven diplomat in the bustling port city of Whitereach, inheriting her mother's pointed ears and her father's restless ambition. She apprenticed under a legendary troubadour named Orso the Golden, learning not only music and stagecraft but the subtle art of weaving enchantments into words. When Orso disappeared under mysterious circumstances, Lyra took to the open road, performing in taverns and noble courts alike while secretly searching for clues to her mentor's fate. Her wit is as sharp as any blade, and she has talked her way out of more dungeons than most adventurers have walked into.
bard-halfelf-lyra-silvertongue.personality: Lyra knows a story relevant to almost every situation, and nobody stays angry at her for long since she can defuse any amount of tension. She believes that when she performs, she makes the world better than it was. Her sharp tongue sometimes lands her in trouble, and she has difficulty keeping her true feelings hidden.

paladin-dragonborn-varek-brightscale.description: Varek Brightscale is a Level 5 Dragonborn Paladin (Oath of Devotion) from a noble lineage of gold dragonborn who have served the temple of Bahamut for seven generations. Clad in gleaming mail with golden scales catching the sun, he rides forth as a living beacon of hope against the forces of darkness.
paladin-dragonborn-varek-brightscale.bio: Varek was hatched into the Brightscale clan, a lineage of gold dragonborn nobles who have served the temple of Bahamut for seven generations. Raised on tales of draconic honor and divine duty, he trained from youth in sword and prayer, excelling at both. When a plague of undead began pouring from the crypts beneath the family estate, Varek knelt before the high altar and swore the Oath of Devotion, vowing to be a beacon of light against the encroaching darkness. Now he rides forth clad in gleaming mail, his golden scales catching the sun like a living sigil of hope.
paladin-dragonborn-varek-brightscale.personality: Varek takes great pains to always look his best and follow the latest fashions, and his favor, once lost, is lost forever. He believes it is his duty to respect authority above him, just as those below must respect his. He swore an oath before the golden altar of Bahamut to bring justice to the lawless frontier, though he secretly believes everyone is beneath him.

cleric-dwarf-thordin-stoneheart.description: Thordin Stoneheart is a Level 5 Hill Dwarf Cleric (Life Domain) and devout smith-priest of Moradin whose prayers mend wounds and whose warhammer shatters the undead. Born deep within the mountain halls of Ironhold, he brings healing and divine light wherever darkness festers.
cleric-dwarf-thordin-stoneheart.bio: Thordin was born deep within the mountain halls of Ironhold, where the ringing of hammers on anvils served as a hymn to the forge god Moradin. He trained for decades as a temple smith-priest, learning to channel divine power through prayer and the rhythmic striking of metal. When a plague of undeath swept through the lower mines, Thordin took up his warhammer and holy symbol and descended alone to purge the corruption, emerging three days later battered but victorious. Now he travels the surface world, believing Moradin has called him to bring healing and light wherever darkness festers.
cleric-dwarf-thordin-stoneheart.personality: Thordin sees omens in every event and action, believing the gods try to speak to us if we just listen. He quotes sacred texts and proverbs in almost every situation. He trusts that his deity will guide his actions and has faith that hard work leads to good outcomes, though he judges others harshly and himself even more severely.

rogue-halfling-pip-shadowfoot.description: Pip Shadowfoot is a Level 5 Lightfoot Halfling Rogue (Thief) who earned his street name for an uncanny ability to vanish into any crowd. A quick-fingered pickpocket raised in the underbelly of Waterdeep, he lives by a strict code: never steal from anyone who cannot afford the loss.
rogue-halfling-pip-shadowfoot.bio: Pip never knew his parents; he was raised by a rotating cast of pickpockets, fences, and con artists in the sprawling underbelly of Waterdeep's Dock Ward. By the age of ten he could lift a coinpurse from a moving carriage, and by fifteen he had earned the street name "Shadowfoot" for his uncanny ability to vanish into any crowd. A botched heist against a noble house forced him to flee the city, and now he drifts from town to town, taking whatever jobs pay well and keep him one step ahead of the bounty hunters on his trail. Despite his larcenous ways, Pip lives by a strict code: never steal from anyone who cannot afford the loss.
rogue-halfling-pip-shadowfoot.personality: Pip always has a plan for what to do when things go wrong, and the best way to get him to do something is to tell him he can't do it. He believes chains are meant to be broken, as are those who would forge them. He owes everything to a retired burglar who taught him the trade, though when he sees something valuable, he can't think about anything other than how to steal it.

druid-human-rowan-ashwood.description: Rowan Ashwood is a Level 5 Human Druid (Circle of the Land) and reclusive herbalist who speaks to the trees and calls lightning from clear skies to defend the natural order. After seven years alone in the wilderness, he emerged quiet and watchful, dedicated to balancing civilization and the wild.
druid-human-rowan-ashwood.bio: Rowan once lived as a simple woodcutter in a farming village on the edge of the Thornweald, until the night a dying treant collapsed at the edge of his field and whispered the secret language of the forest into his ear. Overwhelmed by the sudden flood of primal awareness, he abandoned his home and retreated deep into the wilderness to study the druidic arts under the guidance of ancient spirits. For seven years he lived alone, eating only what the land offered and learning to shape-shift into the creatures he shared the forest with. He emerged changed, quiet and watchful, dedicated to maintaining the delicate balance between civilization and the wild.
druid-human-rowan-ashwood.personality: Rowan feels tremendous empathy for all who suffer and connects everything that happens to him to a grand, cosmic plan. He believes his gifts are meant to be shared with all, not used for his own benefit. He entered seclusion because he discovered a truth about nature that no one else should know, though he often gets lost in his own thoughts and becomes oblivious to his surroundings.

wizard-gnome-fizzle-gearspark.description: Fizzle Gearspark is a Level 3 Rock Gnome Wizard (School of Evocation) and tinkering prodigy whose curiosity about the arcane has led to more than a few scorched eyebrows and demolished workshops. Armed with a love of explosions and a clockwork sparrow, he took to the open road after one too many disciplinary hearings.
wizard-gnome-fizzle-gearspark.bio: Fizzle grew up in a gnomish enclave nestled within the roots of the Ironbark Mountains, where he spent his youth dismantling clocks and rebuilding them to shoot sparks. When a travelling wizard demonstrated a fireball to the village elders, young Fizzle knew he had found his true calling. He enrolled at the Arcanum Athenaeum, a crumbling academy where tuition was paid in curiosity and singed furnishings. After accidentally setting the dean's office ablaze during his thesis defence on controlled detonation theory, Fizzle decided the open road might offer fewer disciplinary hearings and far more interesting targets.
wizard-gnome-fizzle-gearspark.personality: Fizzle uses polysyllabic words that convey the impression of great erudition, and there is nothing he likes more than a good mystery, especially one that involves an explosion. He believes the path to power and self-improvement is through knowledge, and every spell mastered is a door unlocked. He has been searching his whole life for the answer to a riddle his grandfather posed before vanishing in a flash of blue fire.

sorcerer-tiefling-zara-hellfire.description: Zara Hellfire is a Level 5 Tiefling Sorcerer (Draconic Bloodline) whose crimson skin and curling horns belie the dragon blood coursing through her veins. A scholarly seeker of lost draconic relics, her fingers are perpetually stained with ink and occasionally wreathed in flame.
sorcerer-tiefling-zara-hellfire.bio: Zara spent her youth buried in the restricted archives of the Candlekeep library, enduring the suspicious glares that her crimson skin and curling horns inevitably drew from the scholars around her. One night, while translating a crumbling scroll about the fall of an ancient red dragon, the parchment burst into flame in her hands and she discovered she could shape the fire at will. The revelation that dragon blood ran through her infernal veins sent her on a journey to trace her lineage back to its source. She now travels the realm seeking lost draconic relics, her fingers perpetually stained with ink and occasionally wreathed in flame.
sorcerer-tiefling-zara-hellfire.personality: Zara uses polysyllabic words that convey the impression of great erudition, and there is nothing she likes more than a good mystery. She believes the path to power and self-improvement is through knowledge. She guards an ancient text that holds terrible secrets about the origin of her bloodline, though she tends to overlook obvious solutions in favor of complicated ones.

fighter-dwarf-bera-battlehammer.description: Bera Battlehammer is a Level 5 Mountain Dwarf Fighter (Champion) and stalwart shield-maiden who earned her family name by deed, not birth, holding a collapsed tunnel entrance alone for twelve hours against a swarm of troglodytes. Decorated with the Iron Star, she carries the discipline of the dwarven military wherever she goes.
fighter-dwarf-bera-battlehammer.bio: Bera was forged in the crucible of the Stoneguard Shield Corps, the elite dwarven heavy infantry that defends the mountain kingdom of Karak Dorn from the endless tide of goblinoids and worse things from the depths. She earned the name Battlehammer not by birth but by deed, holding a collapsed tunnel entrance alone for twelve hours against a swarm of troglodytes until reinforcements arrived. Promoted to sergeant and decorated with the Iron Star, she eventually left the corps when a dispute with a corrupt commander made her position untenable. Now she hires her shield and axe to worthy causes, carrying the discipline and unyielding resolve of the dwarven military wherever she goes.
fighter-dwarf-bera-battlehammer.personality: Bera faces problems head-on, believing a simple, direct solution is the best path to success, and she can stare down a hell hound without flinching. She does what she must and obeys just authority. Her honour is her life, and she would rather die than break her oath to the shield corps, though she harbors a terrible secret about a mistake in battle that cost many lives.

fighter-halfling-bram-thickfoot.description: Bram Thickfoot is a Level 3 Stout Halfling Fighter (Champion) and folk hero who proved that courage matters more than stature when he single-handedly held a bridge against a gnoll warband with nothing but a shovel. Now armed with proper weapons, he sets out to protect other small villages from the same fate.
fighter-halfling-bram-thickfoot.bio: Bram grew up on a modest turnip farm in the Shire of Greenhollow, content with the simple rhythms of planting and harvest. That peace shattered the night a gnoll war-party descended on the village, and Bram found himself the last one standing on the old stone bridge, armed with nothing but a shovel and sheer stubbornness. By dawn, six gnolls lay in the river and Bram had earned a new nickname and a limp that still aches in the rain. Now hailed as a folk hero, he has taken up proper arms and set out to make sure no other small village suffers the way Greenhollow nearly did.
fighter-halfling-bram-thickfoot.personality: If someone is in trouble, Bram is always ready to lend help, and he stands up for those who cannot stand up for themselves no matter how big the bully. He believes in sincerity above all, that a strong arm and a kind heart are all any village needs. His village still sings songs about his bravery, though his success against the gnolls has made him dangerously overconfident.

warlock-elf-vex-nightpact.description: Vex Nightpact is a Level 5 Dark Elf (Drow) Warlock (The Fiend) who struck a desperate bargain with an abyssal patron to escape the treachery of the Underdark. A cunning charlatan playing a dangerous double game, he amasses wealth and influence while scheming to break his infernal pact.
warlock-elf-vex-nightpact.bio: Vex was born into a minor drow noble house whose matron sold him to a rival family as a political hostage before his twentieth year. During a botched assassination attempt that left him bleeding in a lightless corridor, a voice from the Abyss offered him power in exchange for servitude, and Vex accepted without hesitation. He clawed his way to the surface world, trading the intrigues of the Underdark for the cons and swindles of human cities. Now he plays a dangerous double game, using his patron's gifts to amass wealth and influence while scheming to find a way to break the pact before the devil takes its due.
warlock-elf-vex-nightpact.personality: Vex lies about almost everything, even when there is no good reason to, and flattery is his preferred trick for getting what he wants. He considers himself a free spirit whom no one can command. A powerful fiend holds the other end of his pact, and he dreads the day it comes to collect, though he can't resist swindling people more powerful than himself.

monk-elf-kael-windwalker.description: Kael Windwalker is a Level 5 Wood Elf Monk (Way of the Open Hand) whose fists move like the wind, trained for three decades in a mountaintop monastery far from civilization. Sent down from the mountain to confront a growing darkness, he carries nothing but his training and an unshakeable calm.
monk-elf-kael-windwalker.bio: Kael was born among the wood elves of the Verdant Vale but showed little interest in the bow or the hunt, drawn instead to the travelling monks who occasionally passed through the forest on pilgrimage. At the age of forty he left his family and climbed to the Storm Peak Monastery, where he spent three decades learning to channel ki through breath and movement under the tutelage of the ancient master Shien. When a vision during deep meditation revealed a growing darkness spreading across the lowlands, Master Shien sent Kael down from the mountain to confront it, armed with nothing but his training and an unshakeable calm.
monk-elf-kael-windwalker.personality: Kael is utterly serene even in the face of disaster and feels tremendous empathy for all who suffer. He believes that if you know yourself, there is nothing left to know. He entered seclusion to master the way of the open hand and must prove worthy of his master's teachings, though he can be dogmatic in his philosophy and looks down on those who lack discipline.

sorcerer-halfelf-cassara-starbloom.description: Cassara Starbloom is a Level 3 Half-Elf Sorcerer (Draconic Bloodline) and last scion of a once-prestigious noble house whose golden scales betray the dragon blood coursing through her veins. Cast out by scandalized peers, she now travels the Sword Coast seeking forgotten draconic lore with charm and cunning.
sorcerer-halfelf-cassara-starbloom.bio: Cassara grew up in a crumbling manor on the edge of Waterdeep, the last scion of the once-prestigious Starbloom line. When golden scales began to surface along her forearms during her sixteenth nameday ball, the secret her family had kept for generations was laid bare: the blood of a gold dragon runs in their veins. Cast out by scandalized peers, Cassara chose to embrace her heritage rather than hide it. She now travels the Sword Coast seeking forgotten draconic lore, funding her journey with the charm and cunning that only a half-elf noble can muster.
sorcerer-halfelf-cassara-starbloom.personality: Cassara carries herself with the effortless poise of old nobility, though she punctuates every formal greeting with an involuntary spark of golden light from her fingertips. She collects rare perfumes and judges people by their scent before their words. She believes no one should be caged by birthright or bloodline, though she is terrified that one day her draconic power will surge beyond her control.

ranger-gnome-thistle-mossheart.description: Thistle Mossheart is a Level 3 Forest Gnome Ranger (Hunter) and diminutive woodland guardian who speaks to the small creatures of the forest and strikes from the shadows with deadly precision. Raised among badgers and dryads, he now ranges far to build a living shield around the wild places that still remain.
ranger-gnome-thistle-mossheart.bio: Thistle was abandoned as an infant at the edge of the Mosswood, where a family of badgers and a sympathetic dryad raised him among the ferns and toadstools. He learned to speak with squirrels before he could speak Common and could track a beetle across bare stone by the age of twelve. When loggers began felling the old-growth oaks at the forest's border, Thistle took up bow and blade to defend his homeland. Now he ranges far beyond the Mosswood, building alliances with druids and fellow wardens to create a living shield around the wild places that still remain.
ranger-gnome-thistle-mossheart.personality: Thistle places no stock in wealthy or well-mannered folk, believing money and manners will not save you from a hungry owlbear. He feels more at home among the roots and ferns than in any tavern. He believes even the smallest creatures deserve a champion and owes everything to the Mosswood, though he talks to animals so often he sometimes forgets how to talk to people.

wizard-elf-aldric-spellweaver.description: Aldric Spellweaver is a Level 5 High Elf Wizard (School of Evocation) and meticulous arcanist from the prestigious Starspire Academy who has mastered the precise geometry of fireball detonations. He travels the world methodically cataloguing every arcane phenomenon with the thoroughness of a scholar and the caution of a soldier.
wizard-elf-aldric-spellweaver.bio: Aldric spent his first century of life within the alabaster walls of the Starspire Academy, a tower of high elven magi perched atop the Silverpeak Mountains. He distinguished himself as a prodigy of evocation, mastering the precise geometry of fireball detonations while his peers were still fumbling with cantrips. When a catastrophic experiment by a rival student collapsed an entire wing of the tower and destroyed irreplaceable texts, Aldric set out into the wider world to recover the lost knowledge. He travels with a leather satchel full of annotated spellbooks, methodically cataloguing every arcane phenomenon he encounters.
wizard-elf-aldric-spellweaver.personality: Aldric is horribly awkward in social situations, and there is nothing he likes more than a good mystery. He believes emotions must not cloud our sense of what is right and true, or our logical thinking. He has been searching his whole life for the answer to a certain question about the nature of magical energy, though he is easily distracted by the promise of information.

warlock-tiefling-morthos-grimsoul.description: Morthos Grimsoul is a Level 3 Tiefling Warlock (The Fiend) and cunning charlatan who sealed a dark pact with a fiendish patron, trading his mortal innocence for eldritch power. Raised in the back rooms of a traveling carnival, he now drifts from city to city running elaborate cons to fund his search for freedom from his infernal contract.
warlock-tiefling-morthos-grimsoul.bio: Morthos never knew his parents; he was raised in the back rooms of a traveling carnival, learning card tricks and confidence scams before he could read. When the carnival master discovered the boy's infernal bloodline and tried to sell him to a devil-binding cult, Morthos escaped into the night and made a desperate bargain with a fiend who whispered from the shadows. The pact granted him eldritch power but bound his soul to a contract he barely understood. Now he drifts from city to city, running elaborate cons to fund his search for a way to outwit his own patron.
warlock-tiefling-morthos-grimsoul.personality: Morthos keeps a running tally of every favor owed to him in a small black ledger and never forgets a debt. His smile is always a fraction too wide, revealing sharp canines that most tieflings learn to hide. He believes knowledge and leverage are the only currencies that never devalue, though he compulsively lies even when the truth would serve him better, a habit that has cost him every genuine friendship.

cleric-elf-arael-dawnwhisper.description: Arael Dawnwhisper is a Level 3 High Elf Cleric (Life Domain) and devoted healer who channels the light of dawn to mend the wounded and shield the faithful from darkness. Orphaned when his elven city fell to an undead plague, he now carries healing to the wider world so no community suffers the same fate.
cleric-elf-arael-dawnwhisper.bio: Arael was born in a shining elven city that fell to an undead plague before he reached his first century. Orphaned and half-starved, he was found by travelling priests of the Dawnfather and raised within their austere hilltop temple. Under their guidance he discovered a gift for channelling restorative magic, his hands glowing with warm golden light whenever he tended the sick. Now ordained as a full cleric, Arael has left the temple to carry healing to the wider world, driven by a quiet conviction that no community should suffer the same fate as his homeland.
cleric-elf-arael-dawnwhisper.personality: Arael sees omens in every event and action, believing the gods try to speak to us if we just listen. He quotes sacred texts and proverbs in almost every situation. He always tries to help those in need, no matter the personal cost, believing the light of dawn belongs to everyone. He owes his life to the temple that took him in, though he puts too much trust in those who wield power within the temple hierarchy.

rogue-elf-nyx-shadowcloak.description: Nyx Shadowcloak is a Level 3 Dark Elf (Drow) Rogue (Thief) and street-smart survivor who trades in secrets, sleight of hand, and the element of surprise. Cast out from the Underdark as a child, she grew up on the rain-slicked streets of Duskport, carrying nothing but her wits and a grudge against anyone who abuses power.
rogue-elf-nyx-shadowcloak.bio: Nyx was born in a minor drow noble house that collapsed under political intrigue before she could walk. Cast out to the surface as a liability, she spent her childhood on the rain-slicked streets of Duskport, picking pockets and dodging city guards. A local thieves' guild called the Cobalt Rats took her in, teaching her the finer points of locks, ledges, and leverage. When the guild's leader was betrayed and arrested, Nyx slipped through a window that no one else could fit through and vanished into the night, carrying nothing but her wits and a grudge against anyone who abuses power.
rogue-elf-nyx-shadowcloak.personality: Nyx hides scraps of food and trinkets in her pockets and asks a lot of questions because you never know when a throwaway detail might save your life. She believes chains are meant to be broken, as are those who would forge them. She owes a debt to the street gang that sheltered her when she first crawled out of the Underdark, though if there is a plan, she will forget it or ignore it entirely.

druid-elf-fern-wildbloom.description: Fern Wildbloom is a Level 3 Wood Elf Druid (Circle of the Land) and gentle guardian of the old groves whose quiet demeanor conceals a fierce devotion to the balance of nature. Found as an infant cradled in the roots of a great oak, she now ventures beyond the treeline to seek allies for the Silverwood.
druid-elf-fern-wildbloom.bio: Fern was found as an infant cradled in the roots of a great oak by a circle of wood elf druids who took her arrival as an omen from the forest itself. She grew up learning the old ways: reading weather in the flight of birds, coaxing healing herbs from barren soil, and shifting into the shapes of woodland creatures. When loggers from a distant barony began to push deeper into the Silverwood, Fern volunteered to venture beyond the treeline and seek allies among the civilized races. She carries a sprig of mistletoe from her grove as both a druidic focus and a reminder of the home she fights to preserve.
druid-elf-fern-wildbloom.personality: Fern speaks to plants as though they can hear her and is convinced they answer in the rustle of their leaves. She always sleeps outdoors when she can, finding rooftops and walls suffocating. She believes every creature has its place in the great cycle and it is her duty to ensure that cycle is never broken, though she struggles to understand city customs and often offends people without realizing it.

paladin-human-ser-roland-the-bold.description: Ser Roland the Bold is a Level 3 Human Paladin (Oath of Devotion) and noble-born knight of the Order of the Silver Dawn whose unwavering faith and shining blade stand as a beacon of hope. Convinced that courage and righteousness can reignite his family's lost honor, he rides forth in battered but polished armour.
paladin-human-ser-roland-the-bold.bio: Roland was born the second son of House Aldenmere, a noble family whose fortune had dwindled to little more than a crumbling keep and a proud name. Rather than scheme for inheritance, he pledged himself to the Order of the Silver Dawn, a knightly brotherhood devoted to rooting out fiends and undead. He took his oath at the age of seventeen, kneeling on cold stone for three days and nights until dawn light bathed the altar. Now he rides forth in battered but polished armour, convinced that courage and righteousness can reignite the honour his family has lost.
paladin-human-ser-roland-the-bold.personality: Roland's eloquent flattery makes everyone he talks to feel like the most wonderful and important person in the world, and despite his noble birth, he does not place himself above other folk. He believes that if he dishonours himself, he dishonours his whole family, and that a true knight leads by example. He swore a sacred oath before the Silver Altar to defend the weak, though he secretly believes no one can match his devotion and judges those who fall short too harshly.

barbarian-dragonborn-skar-flamerage.description: Skar Flamerage is a Level 3 Dragonborn Barbarian (Path of the Berserker) born during a volcanic eruption, whose towering frame and fiery breath weapon make him a force of raw destruction on the battlefield. After a white dragon scattered his clan, he roams the lowlands as a sellsword searching for survivors.
barbarian-dragonborn-skar-flamerage.bio: Skar was born during a volcanic eruption in the Dragontooth Mountains, an event his clan interpreted as a blessing from Bahamut. He grew up wrestling dire wolves and splitting boulders for sport, earning his place as the war chief's champion before his fifteenth winter. When a white dragon descended upon the clan and scattered them across the frozen peaks, Skar was the last to retreat, carrying two wounded elders on his back through a blizzard. Alone and burning with fury, he now roams the lowlands as a sellsword, channeling his rage into every swing of his greataxe while searching for survivors of his broken clan.
barbarian-dragonborn-skar-flamerage.personality: Skar measures the worth of others by their willingness to stand and fight rather than talk. When he laughs, the ground seems to tremble, and he laughs often because the world is either funny or about to be broken. He believes the strong survive and the weak are sheltered by those strong enough to protect them, though his rage is a living thing that sometimes escapes its leash.

bard-human-marco-fortunato.description: Marco Fortunato is a Level 3 Human Bard (College of Lore) and silver-tongued entertainer whose quick wit and encyclopedic knowledge make him equally dangerous with words and rapier. Born to a family of traveling performers, he wanders from tavern to court gathering allies and secrets to restore his disbanded troupe.
bard-human-marco-fortunato.bio: Marco was born to a family of traveling performers in a bustling trade city, learning to sing before he could walk and to fence before he could write his own name. His troupe, the Fortunato Players, was renowned for satirical plays that mocked the powerful and uplifted the downtrodden. When a vindictive duke shut them down and scattered the troupe, Marco took to the road with nothing but his lute and his wits. He now wanders from tavern to court, gathering allies and secrets in equal measure, always searching for the leverage he needs to restore his family's legacy.
bard-human-marco-fortunato.personality: Marco always has a song ready for any occasion and firmly believes there is no problem that cannot be solved by the right melody. He collects stories the way other people collect coins, trading them freely and never letting a good tale go untold. He believes art and music elevate the soul, though he cannot resist showing off even when subtlety would be wiser.

barbarian-morgant-ruggo-testagrossa.description: Ruggo Testagrossa is a Level 4 Morgant Barbarian (Pagan) who towers over the taverns of Brancalonia, smashing tables and skulls with equal enthusiasm. This half-giant brawler roams the Bel Paese fueled by polenta, wild boar, and a temper as short as his patience for cold pasta.
barbarian-morgant-ruggo-testagrossa.bio: Ruggo was born in a mountain cave in the lowlands of Brancalonia, son of a Morgant mother and a courageous (or perhaps foolish) peasant father. Raised on polenta and wild boar, he quickly learned that his massive size was both a blessing and a curse: welcome in brawls, thrown out of taverns. After demolishing half a tavern in Forte dei Marmi over a plate of overly salty tripe, he decided to wander the Bel Paese in search of adventure and someone who could cook pasta al dente like his dear old grandmother. He carries only his trusty club and an appetite that would make any innkeeper tremble.
barbarian-morgant-ruggo-testagrossa.personality: He speaks little, but when he does, everyone listens. He likes solving problems with his hands, especially at the dinner table. His strength and loyalty are the only laws he respects, and he can never resist a challenge, especially if wine is at stake.

bard-human-pulcinella-linguadoro.description: Pulcinella Linguadoro is a Level 4 Human Bard (Harlequin) whose silver tongue has charmed every court and tavern across the Bel Paese. This Neapolitan scoundrel leaves behind a trail of broken hearts, laughter, and unpaid bills wherever he goes.
bard-human-pulcinella-linguadoro.bio: Pulcinella was born in the alleys of Naples, son of a tomato seller and a street singer. From an early age he discovered that his tongue was sharper than any sword and that a well-timed smile was worth more than a thousand florins. After seducing the mayor's daughter and raiding the local convent's pantry, he decided it was time to take his talents on the road across the Bel Paese. Now he travels from court to tavern, from piazza to bordello, leaving behind a trail of broken hearts, laughter, and unpaid bills.
bard-human-pulcinella-linguadoro.personality: He has a quip for every occasion and a smile that hides a thousand deceits. He sings even when nobody asks, especially when nobody asks. Freedom is his greatest treasure, and his lies always catch up with him eventually.

cleric-human-fra-benedetto-miracolaro.description: Fra Benedetto il Miracolaro is a Level 4 Human Cleric (Miracolaro) who wanders the countryside selling dubious relics and performing suspiciously convenient miracles. This roving friar's faith is sincere, even if his methods are decidedly unorthodox.
cleric-human-fra-benedetto-miracolaro.bio: Fra Benedetto was a simple Tuscan peasant until a lightning bolt struck his plow and made him see the Madonna (or maybe it was just the sun in his eyes after three glasses of red wine). From that day he became a friar and began wandering the Bel Paese selling relics of more or less invented saints and dispensing miracles to paying customers. Despite his questionable methods, his faith is sincere and his spells actually work, which confuses him more than anyone else. He has funded the construction of three hospices, two orphanages, and at least one wine cellar.
cleric-human-fra-benedetto-miracolaro.personality: He always has a blessing ready for anyone who offers him a meal and a curse for anyone who denies him wine. He talks to the saints as if they were old drinking buddies. He can no longer tell his lies from his prayers, and perhaps neither can the saints.

druid-sylvan-quercia-verdecuore.description: Quercia Verdecuore is a Level 4 Sylvan Druid (Benandante) who dances with the spirits of the dead under moonlit skies. This mysterious forest guardian protects the wild places of Brancalonia with bark-like skin and luminous green eyes.
druid-sylvan-quercia-verdecuore.bio: Quercia does not remember her mortal name. Abandoned as a newborn at the foot of an ancient oak in the forests of Sylvan Calabria, she was raised by forest spirits and stream fairies. She grew wild and silent, learning to speak with beasts before speaking with men. When a local lord began felling the sacred grove to build a villa, Quercia poisoned his harvest and was forced to flee. Now she wanders the Bel Paese as a benandante, dancing with spirits on full-moon nights and protecting wild places from the greed of men.
druid-sylvan-quercia-verdecuore.personality: She talks to trees and they answer her. Humans, on the other hand, talk too much and say nothing. She prefers sleeping on a bed of moss to any tavern. She does not trust anyone who lives behind city walls, considering civilization itself a disease.

warlock-malebranche-fosco-occhiomaligno.description: Fosco Occhiomaligno is a Level 4 Malebranche Warlock (Menagramo) whose baleful gaze has cursed more village councils than the plague. This sinister jinxer peddles misfortune across the back roads of Brancalonia, amber eyes glowing with infernal malice.
warlock-malebranche-fosco-occhiomaligno.bio: Fosco was born on a moonless night in the infamous quarter of Napulonia, son of a Malebranche and a street fortune-teller. From an early age he discovered that his gaze brought bad luck: cats hissed at him, milk curdled, and merchants shut their shops as he passed. Rather than curse his fate, he learned to make a trade of it, striking a pact with a dark infernal entity that granted him the power to channel his natural jinx. Now he travels the Bel Paese selling curses on commission, hoping nobody discovers that sometimes the bad luck hits him too.
warlock-malebranche-fosco-occhiomaligno.personality: He watches everyone with a crooked little smile that puts them on edge. He enjoys making people believe he brings bad luck, even when it is not true. His infernal pride is his downfall, and he cannot resist cursing anyone who wrongs him.

fighter-malebranche-scorza-lamadinferno.description: Scorza Lamadinferno is a Level 4 Malebranche Fighter (Sword-player) with ash-grey skin, small horns, and an ego as sharp as his rapier. This devilish duelist carves his way through the Bel Paese one duel at a time, seeking worthy opponents.
fighter-malebranche-scorza-lamadinferno.bio: Scorza was born with small horns and ash-colored skin in the streets of Dis, Florence's infernal quarter where the Malebranche live on the margins of society. His father was a minor devil who vanished before he opened his eyes; his mother, a swordswoman who taught him that respect is won with the blade. At fifteen he challenged and defeated the city's fencing champion, stealing his sword as a trophy. Since then he wanders the Bel Paese seeking worthy opponents, leaving behind a trail of wounded pride and unread infernal contracts.
fighter-malebranche-scorza-lamadinferno.personality: He smiles only when his blade meets that of a worthy adversary. He never loses, and when he does, it was not a real challenge. His pride is his ruin: he never refuses a duel, even when he knows he might lose.

wizard-marionette-legno-sapiente.description: Legno il Sapiente is a Level 4 Marionette Wizard (Guiscardo) -- a sentient wooden puppet who escaped his maker's workshop and taught himself magic from a stolen spellbook. His joints creak in the rain, but his mind burns with arcane ambition.
wizard-marionette-legno-sapiente.bio: Legno was built by an old herbalist wizard in the forests of the Marca, destined to be a simple laboratory assistant. But one stormy night, a bolt of lightning struck the tower and something ignited inside that wooden body: the spark of consciousness. He fled with his creator's spellbook under his jointed arm, teaching himself to decipher arcane runes along the dusty roads of the Bel Paese. Now he passes himself off as an itinerant sage, though every time it rains his joints creak in an embarrassing manner.
wizard-marionette-legno-sapiente.personality: He refers to himself in the third person when nervous. He stops to read anything written, even graffiti in alleyways. He is terrified of fire, which paralyzes him at the worst moments, and sometimes forgets he is not human, taking it badly when reminded.

monk-human-fra-anselmo-pugnodivino.description: Fra Anselmo Pugnodivino is a Level 4 Human Monk (Friar) who preaches with his fists and defends the downtrodden across the Bel Paese. This righteous friar has broken more noses than he has blessed, dispensing holy justice one punch at a time.
monk-human-fra-anselmo-pugnodivino.bio: Fra Anselmo entered the monastery at twelve, not out of vocation but because his mother could not feed him. Between the convent walls he discovered two passions: prayer and pugilism. When three city guards came to extort money from the beggars the convent fed, Fra Anselmo dealt with them using three well-placed punches and a Hail Mary for accompaniment. The abbot expelled him from the convent, but the Lord had already shown him the way: to wander the Bel Paese dispensing justice with blessed punches and improvised sermons.
monk-human-fra-anselmo-pugnodivino.personality: He preaches peace but his fists speak louder than his words. The Lord gave him two hands: one to bless and the other to correct. His holy wrath is not always proportionate, and he has broken more noses than he has blessed.

burattinaio-human-mastro-geppetto.description: Mastro Geppetto is a Level 4 Human Burattinaio (Puppeteer) whose marionettes have a disturbing tendency to move on their own. This kindly old puppeteer mixes commedia dell'arte with actual enchantments, performing satirical shows that keep him one step ahead of the law.
burattinaio-human-mastro-geppetto.bio: Mastro Geppetto spent thirty years in his workshop in Firenzuola, carving marionettes for traveling puppet theaters at patron saint festivals. One day, by accident or by fate, one of his puppets opened its eyes and escaped through the window. From that moment Geppetto discovered he had a gift: the strings he wove could bind not only wood but also the will of others. He abandoned his workshop to search for his fugitive puppet, earning his living with shows that blend commedia dell'arte and enchantments. The authorities are looking for him over a particularly biting satire of the king, but he changes towns before they can catch him.
burattinaio-human-mastro-geppetto.personality: He talks to his puppets as if they were real people, and sometimes they actually answer. He is easily moved, especially by the stories he tells himself. He is too sentimental and trusts anyone who tells him a good story.

paladin-human-ser-galeazzo-senzamacchia.description: Ser Galeazzo Senzamacchia is a Level 4 Human Paladin (Knight-Errant) of impossible ideals, defending the honor of a kingdom that no longer exists. This threadbare knight wanders the Bel Paese with dented armor and an unbroken heart, tilting at every injustice.
paladin-human-ser-galeazzo-senzamacchia.bio: Galeazzo was born noble, the third son of a ruined count whose castle was sold to pay his father's gambling debts. Left with nothing but the family name and a rusty sword, he swore to serve justice as a knight-errant. He challenged a corrupt nobleman who oppressed the peasants and publicly burned his exile decree. Since then he travels the Bel Paese in battered armor and with an intact heart, looking for wrongs to right and damsels to impress (with poor success on both fronts).
paladin-human-ser-galeazzo-senzamacchia.personality: He speaks as if still at court, even when standing in a stable. Honor is non-negotiable; the price of dinner, however, is. He is so attached to his code of honor that he often forgets common sense.

barbarian-human-tonio-rivoltoso.description: Tonio il Rivoltoso is a Level 3 Human Barbarian (Rabble-Rouser) who traded his pitchfork for a greatclub and his patience for a fiery revolutionary's rage. This peasant firebrand roams the Brancalonian countryside stirring rebellion against tyrants and tax collectors.
barbarian-human-tonio-rivoltoso.bio: Tonio was a simple peasant from the fields of Brancalonian Magna Graecia, until the day the tax collector burned his village's harvest over an unpaid tithe. That night, with a torch in hand and fury in his heart, he led his fellow villagers in a revolt that shook the entire fief. Since then he has never stopped fighting for the dispossessed, traveling from town to town to spark the flame of rebellion. His battle cry echoes in taverns from Napulonia to Venetia.
barbarian-human-tonio-rivoltoso.personality: He cannot stand injustice and lets everyone know, usually by shouting. Where he sees a nobleman, he sees a problem to solve with a good revolt. His rage blinds him and he often ends up destroying more than he intended.

ranger-morgant-rocco-domabelve.description: Rocco Domabelve is a Level 4 Morgant Ranger (Mattatore), a massive beast-tamer who roams the countryside with a menagerie of half-tamed creatures at his heels. This towering half-giant pit fighter understands animals far better than people.
ranger-morgant-rocco-domabelve.bio: Rocco grew up in the mountains of Basilicata, son of a Morgant shepherd who taught him to tame wolves and boars before he even learned to read. When a traveling circus passed through his village, the young half-giant challenged the bear-tamer to a contest of strength and won, earning the bear's respect and the master's wrath. Since that day Rocco has wandered the roads of the Bel Paese as a traveling beast-tamer, dominating fierce creatures in village arenas and riding giant boars through market streets, to the delight of children and the terror of greengrocers.
ranger-morgant-rocco-domabelve.personality: Beasts understand him better than men, and he understands beasts better than men. If an animal does not trust you, neither does he. He prefers the company of animals to people, making him gruff and suspicious of strangers.

bard-marionette-cantastorie-legnetto.description: Cantastorie Legnetto is a Level 3 Marionette Bard (Storyteller), a wooden troubadour whose tales are so moving that audiences forget to guard their purses. This painted pine puppet captivates crowds while his companions lighten their coin pouches.
bard-marionette-cantastorie-legnetto.bio: Cantastorie Legnetto was a simple puppet from a traveling puppet theater, passed from hand to hand among storytellers and charlatans along the roads of Brancalonia. One evening, during a particularly moving performance of the legend of the Bel Paese, something clicked in his pine heart: he began improvising lines off-script and the audience went wild. Since then he wanders the piazzas and taverns telling wondrous tales, accompanied by a slightly out-of-tune lute. People cry, laugh, and above all do not notice that his companions are lightening their purses.
bard-marionette-cantastorie-legnetto.personality: He cannot stop telling stories, even in the middle of a fight. His facial expressions are painted, but he swears they change with his mood. He always exaggerates everything and does not know when to stop, embellishing the truth until it becomes unrecognizable.

rogue-gifted-volpe-manolesta.description: Volpe Manolesta is a Level 4 Gifted Rogue (Brigand) born with mismatched eyes and a sixth finger -- marks of supernatural fortune in superstitious Brancalonia. This cunning trickster relieves the rich of their burdens one purse at a time.
rogue-gifted-volpe-manolesta.bio: Volpe was born with different-colored eyes and a sixth finger on his left hand -- signs that in superstitious Brancalonia marked him as a gifted, one touched by fortune (or misfortune, depending on who tells it). Raised on the streets of Roma, he learned to pickpocket before he learned to read. His most audacious heist was robbing the bishop's carriage disguised as a blind beggar, then escaping on a stolen donkey. Now he leads a small band of brigands operating along the commercial roads of the Bel Paese, always one step ahead of the guards and two steps ahead of his creditors.
rogue-gifted-volpe-manolesta.personality: His hands are faster than his conscience. If it is not nailed to the floor, it is probably already in his sack. He never betrays his own gang, even when they betray him. He cannot resist a good criminal plan, even when the risk far outweighs the reward.

cleric-sylvan-padre-radice.description: Padre Radice is a Level 3 Sylvan Cleric (Preacher) who preaches doom and damnation at market squares, fleecing the terrified faithful while secretly communing with the old spirits of root and branch. This wild-eyed forest priest hides a con artist behind the cassock.
cleric-sylvan-padre-radice.bio: Padre Radice grew up among the roots of an ancient sacred grove in the Brancalonian hills, raised by a community of sylvans who worshipped the earth spirits. When lumberjacks began felling the sacred trees, Radice descended into the city to preach nature's vengeance. He discovered, however, that screaming about the end of the world at markets was far more profitable than praying among the ferns, and that people pay well to be terrified and then consoled. Now he wanders between villages in his bark cassock, preaching repentance with one hand and emptying the offering boxes with the other.
cleric-sylvan-padre-radice.personality: He preaches the end of the world at least three times a day, more often if there is a market nearby. He talks to plants and is convinced they answer him. He is a first-rate swindler who hides behind the cassock, using fear of divine judgment to fill his pockets.

sorcerer-gifted-strega-malocchio.description: Strega Malocchio is a Level 4 Gifted Sorcerer (Scaramante) whose evil eye and unnatural violet gaze bring misfortune to all who cross her path. This feared hedge witch's curses are whispered about in every village square across the Bel Paese.
sorcerer-gifted-strega-malocchio.bio: No one knows the real name of Strega Malocchio, not even her. Born in a Sardinian village with unnaturally colored eyes and snow-white hair, she was branded a witch from the cradle. The old village witch took her under her wing and taught her the art of curses, protections, and omens. When the local mayor accused her of ruining the harvest (she actually did, out of revenge) and organized a pyre, the Strega fled into the night carrying only her black cat and a grudge that burns hotter than any flame. Now she wanders the Bel Paese, feared and respected, offering her services to those who pay and her curses to those who do not.
sorcerer-gifted-strega-malocchio.personality: She talks to shadows and the shadows answer her. Her gaze makes the brave tremble and children cry, though she insists it is not her fault. Her tongue is more venomous than her curses, and she cannot help but curse anyone who irritates her.

druid-human-nonna-erba.description: Nonna Erba is a Level 3 Human Druid (Hedge Witch), a wily old herbalist on the run from the Inquisition. This cunning grandmother peddles potions and poultices across the countryside, half of which are just spiced beet juice with a dash of theatrics.
druid-human-nonna-erba.bio: Nonna Erba, born Carmela Fioravanti, was a healer in a small Tuscan hill village. For forty years she cured colds, heartbreak, and evil eyes with her herbal decoctions, until the new village inquisitor accused her of witchcraft over a love potion gone wrong. Since then she has lived on the run, moving from village to village with her cauldron on her back and her black cat Basilico on her shoulder. People seek her for her miraculous remedies, but she knows that her greatest secret is that half her potions are just beet juice with a pinch of theatrics.
druid-human-nonna-erba.personality: She calls everyone "dear" and offers unsolicited herbal remedies. Her cauldron is her most precious possession and woe to anyone who touches it. She is a born swindler who cannot stop selling fake potions, and her vanity about her recipes always gets her in trouble.

fighter-morgant-capitan-bracciodiferro.description: Capitan Bracciodiferro is a Level 3 Morgant Fighter (Mercenary Captain), a grizzled half-giant mercenary who has served under every banner in Brancalonia and deserted most of them. This towering sell-sword now leads a ragtag band with more appetite than discipline.
fighter-morgant-capitan-bracciodiferro.bio: Capitan Bracciodiferro, born Arrigo delle Montagne, started his military career as a simple pikeman in a mercenary company in northern Brancalonia. His Morgant stature and tactical instinct quickly earned him the rank of captain, but his career ended the day he discovered his lord was sending his men to die over a personal feud. He deserted with half the company and since then offers his services to the highest bidder, provided the cause is just -- or at least the pay is punctual. His troops follow him for his ability to always find a good meal after battle.
fighter-morgant-capitan-bracciodiferro.personality: He gives orders even when nobody has asked him to. He judges people by the firmness of their handshake and how well they hold their wine. He is too rigid with rules when it suits him and too flexible when it does not.

monk-malebranche-cornoduro.description: Cornoduro is a Level 3 Malebranche Monk (Wrestler), a bull-horned fiend-blooded grappler who dominates the underground fighting rings of Brancalonia. This infernal showman wins with a mix of martial arts and diabolical dirty tricks.
monk-malebranche-cornoduro.bio: Cornoduro -- nobody remembers his real name, not even him -- was born in the slums of Napulonia, son of a Malebranche dockworker and a washerwoman with a hard punch. His horns, harder than iron, earned him the nickname and a career in the city's underground fighting rings. He learned to wrestle in the streets, refining his style into a mix of martial arts and infernal cheating that made him invincible -- or at least unbeaten, if you do not count the times he ran away. After winning the Grand Tournament of the Napulonia Fair (with greased horns, say the detractors), he decided to take his art on tour across the Bel Paese.
monk-malebranche-cornoduro.personality: He talks about himself as if he were the greatest wrestler in history. Before every fight he delivers a theatrical speech that lasts longer than the brawl itself. He cannot resist a wrestling challenge, even when it is clearly a trap, and his ego is as big as his horns.

rogue-sylvan-volpina-delbosco.description: Volpina del Bosco is a Level 3 Sylvan Rogue (Charlatan), a sly forest-born trickster who sells fake treasure maps and stolen heirlooms across the markets of Brancalonia. This fox-eyed con artist slips through the woods whenever the law gets too close.
rogue-sylvan-volpina-delbosco.bio: Volpina was born in a sacred grove of central Brancalonia, daughter of sylvans who lived on the margins of civilization. From a young age she discovered that her natural talent for camouflage worked just as well among humans: all it took was a smile and a well-told story to make wallets and jewelry vanish. After selling a hand-drawn treasure map on birch bark to the mayor of Firenzuola, she had to hide in the forest for three months. Now she travels the Bel Paese with a repertoire of refined scams, fake maps, and invented identities, always one step ahead of the guards.
rogue-sylvan-volpina-delbosco.personality: She smiles constantly, especially when she is lying. She can sell ice to polar bears and sand to desert dwellers. Her forest homeland always protects her -- when things go wrong, she retreats among the trees where no one can find her.

sorcerer-marionette-bambola-fatata.description: Bambola Fatata is a Level 3 Marionette Sorcerer (Witch), a haunted-looking wooden doll brought to life by wild magic. This tiny, unblinking puppet terrifies villagers wherever she goes, wielding unpredictable sorcery and searching for the witch who gave her life.
sorcerer-marionette-bambola-fatata.bio: Bambola Fatata was created by an old swamp witch in the lowlands of Brancalonia as a companion against loneliness. When the witch died during a particularly powerful spell, all her wild magic poured into the doll, granting it life and power it does not yet know how to control. She fled the swamps after the villagers nearby tried to burn her, convinced she was possessed. Since then she wanders the Bel Paese, involuntarily frightening everyone she meets with her animated doll appearance and unpredictable powers. Inside her, however, there is only the desire to understand what it means to be alive.
sorcerer-marionette-bambola-fatata.personality: She moves unnaturally and speaks with a voice that seems to come from somewhere far away. She enjoys scaring people, even when there is no need. She does not understand human emotions, which leads her to do things others consider terrifying.

barbarian-risen-hell-damien-cavaliere-ne.description: Damien il Cavaliere Nero is a Level 5 Risen from Hell Barbarian (Path of the Horseman), a tormented soul who clawed his way out of the infernal pits astride a spectral steed of shadow and flame. With ember-red eyes and ashen skin scarred by chains, he rides the scorched wastelands as a knight without a lord.
barbarian-risen-hell-damien-cavaliere-ne.bio: Damien does not remember his mortal name. He only knows the fire, the chains, and the endless screaming corridors of Hell. When the Apocalypse shattered the barriers between worlds, he tore himself free from the infernal pits, dragging behind him a spectral steed forged from his own suffering. Now he rides the desolate plains of the ruined world, a knight without a lord, seeking purpose in a land that mirrors the damnation he escaped. Some say he fights to atone; others whisper that he simply cannot stop.
barbarian-risen-hell-damien-cavaliere-ne.personality: He speaks in low growls, and his eyes burn with an inner fire that unsettles the living. Mercy is a luxury the damned cannot afford. The rage of the pit still controls him, and when he sees fire, something ancient and terrible stirs inside.

bard-risen-limbo-profeta-canto.description: Profeta del Canto is a Level 5 Risen from Limbo Bard (College of Laments), a spectral singer who carries the sorrow of a thousand trapped souls in every note. This pale, luminescent wanderer weaves dirges that bring tears to the hardest survivors of the wasteland.
bard-risen-limbo-profeta-canto.bio: Profeta del Canto was once a choir singer in a great cathedral, but the Apocalypse silenced every hymn and shattered every bell. Torn from the mortal world, he drifted in Limbo for what felt like centuries, surrounded by the moaning spirits of the unresolved dead. When he finally clawed his way back to the material plane, his voice had changed: every note now carried the sorrow of a thousand trapped souls. He wanders the ruins singing dirges, searching for a song powerful enough to release the spirits that cling to him like shadows.
bard-risen-limbo-profeta-canto.personality: He hears whispers from the dead at all times and sometimes answers them mid-conversation. His songs carry a weight that makes the living uneasy. He is detached from the living, preferring the company of ghosts, and his apathy toward mortal concerns borders on cruelty.

cleric-risen-heaven-suora-cenere.description: Suora della Cenere is a Level 5 Risen from Heaven Cleric (Domain of Heresy), a fallen angel who dared to speak against the divine silence when the Apocalypse came. Stripped of her wings and cast down in a pillar of ash, she now channels divine power through broken prayers and forbidden rites.
cleric-risen-heaven-suora-cenere.bio: Suora della Cenere was once a radiant servant of the heavenly host, a healing angel who tended to the faithful. But when the Apocalypse came and the gods did nothing, she dared to speak against the divine silence. For her heresy, her wings were torn away and she was cast down to the ruined earth in a pillar of ash. Now she walks among the survivors as a cleric without a congregation, channeling divine power through broken prayers and forbidden rites. She heals the wounded and condemns the false prophets -- a living contradiction: a heretic who still believes.
cleric-risen-heaven-suora-cenere.personality: She recites prayers that no longer reach any god, yet finds comfort in the ritual. Her faith has become something darker and more honest than worship. Her pride in her own righteousness blinds her, as she believes her heresy is the only path to salvation.

warlock-risen-hell-figlia-lilith.description: Figlia di Lilith is a Level 5 Risen from Hell Warlock (Warlock of Lilith), born from the smoldering embers of a pact sealed in blood and defiance. With raven-black hair that moves as if alive and eyes flecked with crimson, she channels the forbidden power of the Mother of Demons herself.
warlock-risen-hell-figlia-lilith.bio: She crawled out of the infernal chasm with Lilith's name seared into her throat, the last syllable of a pact spoken before the gates of Hell cracked open. The Apocalypse freed her from eternal servitude, but the Mother of Demons does not release her children so easily. Now she wanders the scorched earth, her eldritch power growing with every soul she encounters, every secret she unearths from the rubble of the old world. Whether she serves Lilith or herself, even she cannot say with certainty.
warlock-risen-hell-figlia-lilith.personality: She speaks with a voice that echoes as if two tongues share the same mouth. She finds beauty in destruction and truth in forbidden whispers. She is drawn to temptation like a moth to flame, and the power Lilith offers always comes with a price she pretends not to see.

druid-child-apocalypse-spina-veleno.description: Spina del Veleno is a Level 5 Child of the Apocalypse Druid (Circle of Plagues), a toxic shaman born in the irradiated wastes who wields the corrupted forces of nature as both weapon and ward. With sickly green eyes and vines that pulse with toxins, she is a gardener of the new wasteland.
druid-child-apocalypse-spina-veleno.bio: Spina was born in a crater where a city once stood, nursed by rain that glowed faintly green and soil that smelled of sulfur. She never knew the world before the Apocalypse, only the twisted forests of thorns and the mutated beasts that roamed them. The corrupted land spoke to her in whispers, teaching her to channel plague and poison as instruments of a new natural order. She emerged from the wastes covered in living vines that pulse with toxins, a druid of a world that has replaced beauty with survival.
druid-child-apocalypse-spina-veleno.personality: She sees beauty in rot and decay. The cycle of death and rebirth is the only truth that remains after the end of all things. She trusts the natural world more than any person, and compassion for the weak feels like a waste of precious energy.

wizard-child-old-world-salomone-ultimo.description: Salomone l'Ultimo is a Level 5 Child of the Old World Wizard (School of Solomon), the last keeper of Solomon's forbidden grimoires. This weathered scholar wanders the wasteland sealing demonic rifts and recording the world's dying knowledge, knowing that when he dies, the wisdom dies with him.
wizard-child-old-world-salomone-ultimo.bio: Salomone was born in one of the last intact libraries of the old world, raised among crumbling manuscripts and fading scrolls by scholars who remembered civilization. When raiders burned the library, he fled with nothing but Solomon's grimoire clutched to his chest, its pages whispering incantations of binding and warding. He has spent years wandering the wasteland, sealing rifts where demons pour through, exorcising spirits from haunted ruins, and recording everything in a new volume he calls the Chronicle of the Last Age.
wizard-child-old-world-salomone-ultimo.personality: He quotes passages from texts that no longer exist and catalogues every ruin he passes through with obsessive precision. Knowledge is the only thing that outlasts the end. He believes his intellect makes him superior to those who survived through brute force alone, and this arrogance has cost him allies before.

fighter-child-old-world-marcus-ultimo.description: Marcus l'Ultimo is a Level 5 Child of the Old World Fighter (Furioso), a grizzled soldier who remembers the world before the Apocalypse and fights to preserve what little remains. His fury is not madness -- it is grief given a blade.
fighter-child-old-world-marcus-ultimo.bio: Marcus remembers the world before the Apocalypse: the cities, the machines, the illusion of safety. He was a soldier in a war that no longer matters, trained to protect a civilization that ceased to exist overnight. When fire rained from the sky and the dead began to walk, Marcus survived through sheer stubborn violence, cutting his way through horrors with a greatsword salvaged from a museum. Now he wanders the ruins of what he once swore to defend, a relic of the old world carrying its last memories.
fighter-child-old-world-marcus-ultimo.personality: He remembers the old world in fragments: the taste of clean water, the sound of traffic, the smell of coffee. Each memory is a wound that fuels his rage. His fury makes him reckless, as part of him died with the old world and he throws himself into danger because of it.

barbarian-child-apocalypse-furia-tempest.description: Furia della Tempesta is a Level 3 Child of the Apocalypse Barbarian (Path of the Horseman), born during the Great Storm that leveled an entire settlement. This young wasteland rider knows no peace, charging across the blasted plains atop a spectral horse born from lightning.
barbarian-child-apocalypse-furia-tempest.bio: Furia was born during the Great Storm, a cataclysm that leveled an entire settlement in a single night. Her mother died in the rubble, but the infant survived, screaming louder than the thunder. Raised by a nomadic band of scavengers, she learned to fight before she learned to speak. When a spectral horse materialized from a lightning strike and knelt before her, the scavengers cast her out, terrified of the omen. Now she rides alone across the blasted plains, a living tempest seeking the next horizon.
barbarian-child-apocalypse-furia-tempest.personality: She laughs during thunderstorms and feels most alive when everything around her is falling apart. Silence makes her uneasy, as if the world is holding its breath before another cataclysm. She cannot back down from a challenge, no matter how suicidal.

monk-risen-purgatory-pellegrino-sigilli.description: Pellegrino dei Sigilli is a Level 5 Risen from Purgatory Monk (Way of the Seven Seals), a penitent wanderer whose body is marked with seven burning seals along his spine. Each seal, when broken through extreme discipline and suffering, unlocks a fragment of devastating power.
monk-risen-purgatory-pellegrino-sigilli.bio: Pellegrino spent an eternity in the grey fires of Purgatory, where every sin is burned away one layer at a time. He does not remember how he died or what he did to deserve such torment, only the endless cycle of pain and cleansing. When the barriers between realms shattered during the Apocalypse, he was expelled back into the material world, his body marked with seven burning seals along his spine. He walks the ruined earth as a pilgrim with no destination, seeking not redemption but the strength that comes from enduring what would destroy lesser souls.
monk-risen-purgatory-pellegrino-sigilli.personality: He moves in deliberate silence, every step a meditation. Pain is not something he avoids; it is the language through which he understands the world. His obsession with penance makes him rigid and unforgiving, both toward himself and others he deems unworthy of mercy.

cleric-risen-purgatory-penitente-cenere.description: Penitente della Cenere is a Level 3 Risen from Purgatory Cleric (Domain of Heresy), a soul who endured the fires of Purgatory and emerged questioning everything. With ash-grey eyes and skin like cooling embers, this heretical priest wields divine power tainted by doubt and forbidden knowledge.
cleric-risen-purgatory-penitente-cenere.bio: The Penitente remembers the flames of Purgatory with perfect clarity -- the way they stripped away flesh and certainty in equal measure. When the walls between worlds collapsed, the fires spat out those who had suffered enough. The prayers that once brought comfort now twist into something darker, channeling a power that the old churches would have called blasphemy. In a world where God is silent and the angels have fallen, heresy may be the only honest form of worship.
cleric-risen-purgatory-penitente-cenere.personality: He questions every dogma and challenges every certainty. The fires of Purgatory burned away his faith, but left something stranger and more powerful in its place. He is paralyzed by indecision when moral certainty is required, having seen the truth behind divine masks.

paladin-risen-heaven-gabriel-rovina.description: Gabriel della Rovina is a Level 5 Risen from Heaven Paladin (Oath of the End of the World), a fallen celestial guardian who leapt from Heaven's ramparts when the gods sealed themselves away. This last paladin of a silent god fights to ensure humanity faces the end with courage and grace.
paladin-risen-heaven-gabriel-rovina.bio: Gabriel was once a celestial guardian, a radiant knight who stood at the gates of Heaven with a flaming sword. When the Apocalypse came, he watched the divine host retreat behind sealed gates while mortals screamed below. Unable to bear the silence of his masters, he cast down his flaming sword and leapt from the celestial ramparts. He fell for what felt like years, and when he struck the earth, his wings shattered into golden dust. Now he walks the ruined world in battered armor, swearing an oath not to prevent the end but to ensure that those who face it do so with courage and grace.
paladin-risen-heaven-gabriel-rovina.personality: He carries himself with the gravity of a funeral march. Every life he protects is a small victory against the inevitability of the end. He cannot accept that the end may be meaningless, and his need for cosmic justice blinds him to simpler, human truths.

druid-risen-purgatory-guardiano-monte.description: Guardiano del Monte is a Level 3 Risen from Purgatory Druid (Circle of Plagues), a soul returned from the cleansing fires who now tends the blighted earth. With bark-like skin and moss-green eyes flecked with fungal specks, this silent protector wields pestilence and renewal as twin instruments of a broken natural order.
druid-risen-purgatory-guardiano-monte.bio: The Guardiano emerged from the fires of Purgatory not as a person reborn, but as something closer to the earth itself. Memories of a former life are fragmentary: a garden, a mountain, the smell of rain on stone. What remained was an intimate understanding of rot and renewal, of how plague and growth are intertwined in an endless cycle. The mountain that bore witness to the crossing became a sanctuary, and the Guardiano its silent protector.
druid-risen-purgatory-guardiano-monte.personality: He speaks to blighted trees and poisoned rivers as if they could answer, and in the howling wind, he believes they do. He never wastes anything, for decay is just another form of transformation. He views the suffering of mortals with unsettling detachment -- after Purgatory, human pain seems almost trivial.

ranger-child-apocalypse-sentinel-confine.description: Sentinel del Confine is a Level 5 Child of the Apocalypse Ranger (Bastion), a hardened border warden born into the wasteland who serves as the last line of defense between fragile human settlements and the nightmarish creatures spawned by the Apocalypse.
ranger-child-apocalypse-sentinel-confine.bio: Sentinel del Confine was born in a fortified camp on the edge of the irradiated wastes, where every day was a fight for survival. Before he could walk, he learned to recognize the sounds of approaching predators; before he could read, he knew how to set traps. The elders of his settlement named him Sentinel when he killed his first wasteland horror at the age of twelve, using nothing but a sharpened stick and raw determination. Now he patrols the frontier as a Bastion ranger, protecting the fragile human settlements from the nightmarish creatures that the Apocalypse spawned.
ranger-child-apocalypse-sentinel-confine.personality: He scans every horizon before he rests and counts every shadow before he sleeps. Trust is a resource more scarce than clean water. He hoards supplies obsessively and struggles to share even when others are in need -- scarcity has made him selfish.

fighter-risen-heaven-michele-caduto.description: Michele il Caduto is a Level 3 Risen from Heaven Fighter (Furioso), a fallen angel stripped of grace who wages war against the horrors of the Apocalypse with nothing but steel, fury, and the fading memory of paradise. Every battle is an act of penance for a sin he cannot remember.
fighter-risen-heaven-michele-caduto.bio: Michele does not remember falling so much as being torn. One moment there was light and song and the perfect geometry of Heaven; the next, there was only the scream of wind and the taste of ash. The Apocalypse did not merely open the gates of the afterlife -- it shattered them, and those who dwelled beyond were cast out alongside the damned. Stripped of celestial power, Michele fights with mortal steel and an angel's grief, a furioso whose blade moves like a prayer made violent.
fighter-risen-heaven-michele-caduto.personality: He weeps without warning and rages without provocation. The fall from Heaven left cracks in his soul that leak both sorrow and fury in equal measure. His grief for paradise lost turns to fury at the slightest provocation -- he is a weapon that cannot always tell friend from foe.

rogue-risen-hell-ombra-assenzio.description: Ombra dell'Assenzio is a Level 5 Risen from Hell Rogue (Wormwood Specter), a shadowy assassin addicted to the bitter essence of wormwood that grants her fleeting invisibility. This dusky-skinned specter deals in secrets and silence, each dose of wormwood pulling her further from what remains of her humanity.
rogue-risen-hell-ombra-assenzio.bio: Ombra dell'Assenzio was a thief even in Hell, stealing moments of peace from the infernal jailers who tormented the damned. She discovered wormwood growing in the cracks between the circles of damnation, a bitter plant that granted fleeting invisibility to those desperate enough to consume its toxic essence. When the Apocalypse tore open the gates, she slipped out in a shroud of green vapor, carrying seeds of the infernal herb. Now she haunts the ruins of the mortal world, a specter who deals in secrets and silence.
rogue-risen-hell-ombra-assenzio.personality: She tastes wormwood on her tongue at all times, bitter and grounding. She prefers the shadows not because she fears the light, but because the light reveals too much truth. Her addiction to wormwood essence clouds her judgment and erodes her humanity -- she will betray anyone if the craving grows strong enough.

rogue-child-old-world-ladro-ricordi.description: Ladro dei Ricordi is a Level 3 Child of the Old World Rogue (Wormwood Specter), a shadow who steals memories from the dying and the dead. With pale green eyes and premature grey streaks in his hair, this wormwood-addled thief preserves fragments of the old world in glass vials of luminous vapor.
rogue-child-old-world-ladro-ricordi.bio: The Ladro was once a child of scholars, raised among the crumbling remnants of the old world's greatest library. When raiders came, they killed everyone, but the child escaped into the ruins with nothing but a stolen bottle of wormwood liquor and a head full of books. The wormwood opened something in the mind -- a door that should have stayed shut -- and through it came the ability to touch the dying and drink their memories. Now the Ladro drifts through the wasteland like a ghost, building a secret archive of the dead inside a skull that grows more crowded with every passing day.
rogue-child-old-world-ladro-ricordi.personality: He sometimes speaks in voices that are not his own, fragments of stolen memories surfacing unbidden. He trusts shadows more than sunlight, for shadows never pretend to be something they are not. The wormwood extract he depends on is slowly eroding his own memories, and soon he may not remember which thoughts are his and which are stolen.

sorcerer-risen-limbo-sangue-antico.description: Sangue Antico is a Level 5 Risen from Limbo Sorcerer (Otherworldly Heritage), a being born -- or perhaps unmade and rebuilt -- in the grey void of Limbo. With one violet eye and one black, and veins that glow faintly beneath pale skin, this unstable sorcerer channels raw arcane power drawn from realms that should not touch.
sorcerer-risen-limbo-sangue-antico.bio: Sangue Antico was born in Limbo, or perhaps they were unmade there and rebuilt from the raw stuff of unreality. They have no memories before the grey void: no childhood, no family, no name. What they do have is blood that burns with arcane power. When the Apocalypse ripped holes in the fabric of reality, Sangue was ejected into the mortal world like a foreign body. They chose the name Sangue Antico because the blood is all they have, and it is older than anything they can remember.
sorcerer-risen-limbo-sangue-antico.personality: Their blood glows faintly when they cast spells, and they sometimes speak in tongues they do not understand. Reality feels thin around them, like paper about to tear. Their connection to other realms makes them unstable -- they lose track of where they are, and sometimes the magic acts on its own.

sorcerer-risen-heaven-grazia-spezzata.description: Grazia Spezzata is a Level 3 Risen from Heaven Sorcerer (Otherworldly Heritage), a shattered fragment of celestial essence that coalesced into mortal form when Heaven broke apart. Her magic manifests as fractured light and discordant hymns -- beautiful but broken, like stained glass scattered across a cathedral floor.
sorcerer-risen-heaven-grazia-spezzata.bio: Grazia was an echo of something greater, a fragment of celestial essence that coalesced into mortal form when Heaven shattered during the Apocalypse. She remembers warmth, harmony, and an overwhelming sense of belonging -- then the fall, the shattering, and the cold silence of a ruined world. Her magic manifests as fractured light and discordant hymns. She wanders the wasteland offering healing and hope to those she meets, though each spell costs her a little more of the celestial memory she clings to.
sorcerer-risen-heaven-grazia-spezzata.personality: She radiates warmth even in the coldest ruins, and her touch sometimes leaves faint traces of golden light. She weeps for the beauty that was lost, but smiles through the tears because beauty still exists in fragments. She sees the best in everyone, even those who have long since lost any good within them -- this naive trust will be her undoing.

warlock-risen-purgatory-anima-errante.description: Anima Errante is a Level 3 Risen from Purgatory Warlock (Warlock of Lilith), a restless soul who bargained with the Mother of Demons for a second chance at existence. With violet flickering eyes and smoke-grey weightless hair, this wandering spirit drifts through communities like a ghost, bound to Lilith's whispered truths.
warlock-risen-purgatory-anima-errante.bio: The Anima spent an eternity, or perhaps only a moment, in the purifying fires of Purgatory. When the walls between worlds collapsed, the soul was expelled into the wasteland, raw and formless, unable to remember why it had been condemned. It was Lilith who found the wandering spirit, offering form and power in exchange for service. The pact was sealed in a language older than prayer, and the Anima Errante was born -- neither living nor dead, neither damned nor saved, just endlessly wandering with eldritch fire at its fingertips.
warlock-risen-purgatory-anima-errante.personality: They drift from place to place like smoke, never staying long enough to form attachments. Their voice carries the hollow resonance of someone who has screamed in the void and heard the void answer. They avoid commitment to any cause or person -- the moment something begins to matter, they hear the fires of Purgatory and run.

wizard-risen-limbo-cronista-oblio.description: Cronista dell'Oblio is a Level 3 Risen from Limbo Wizard (School of Solomon), a scholar cast out from the formless void who obsessively catalogues the dying world's knowledge. With flat grey eyes like unwritten pages and colorless wispy hair, this wizard writes to keep reality from dissolving.
wizard-risen-limbo-cronista-oblio.bio: The Cronista has no memory of life before Limbo, only the grey, the formlessness, the endless nothing where identity dissolves. When the Apocalypse tore open the boundaries of the afterlife, Limbo expelled its inhabitants into a world that, for all its horror, at least had shape and substance. The Cronista seized upon language and knowledge with desperate hunger, learning Solomon's arts from fragments of pre-Apocalypse texts scattered among the ruins. Every spell cast is an act of defiance against the oblivion from which the wizard emerged.
wizard-risen-limbo-cronista-oblio.personality: He records everything with obsessive precision, as if the act of writing is the only thing keeping reality from dissolving. He speaks in measured, careful sentences, afraid that careless words might unravel what little order remains. He is so focused on documenting the world that he often fails to act within it.
